---
title: "Metashape MicaSense Altum workflow"
id: activity-metashape-altum
order: 107
summary: "A tutorial for processing multisensor datasets from a MicaSense Altum sensor in Metashape."
source_url: "https://agisoft.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/31000148381-micasense-altum-processing-workflow-including-reflectance-calibration-in-agisoft-metashape-professi"
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
Goals:
  - module-goals-pp
activity:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
labels:
  - advanced
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/activities-Metashape-wf-12.md"
---
